titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Class of 1929, Sheffield Scientific School, Yale University, Records
Class of 1929, Sheffield Scientific School, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Christine Connolly

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday September 4, 2020 at 07:30

did.unittitle: Class of 1929, Sheffield Scientific School, Yale University, records
did.abstract: The records consist of correspondence, subject files, news clippings, photographs and sound recordings documenting the Yale Sheffield Scientific School Class of 1929 and its reunions.

corpname.part: Yale University. Sheffield Scientific School. Class of 1929

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 10-B (YRG 10-B), Records of Sheffield Scientific School classes.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The records were donated by Howard Gambrill, 2004; family of Watson F. Kinney, 2008.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the materials is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Class of 1929, Sheffield Scientific School, Yale University, Records (RU 952). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of correspondence, subject files, news clippings, photographs and sound recordings documenting the Yale Sheffield Scientific School Class of 1929 and its reunions.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

corpname.part: Yale University. Sheffield Scientific School. Class of 1929

did.unittitle: Photographs, newsclipping, and ephemera of Howard Gambrill (1929S), documenting Yale
Tours: Yale Art Gallery, Center for British Art, University libraries
Yale '29 since 50th Reunion [snapshots, reunion button, notes for dinner talk]
Special Yale Personal [clippings, photos, certificates, etc.]
Yale '29: Dinners and lunches, New Haven
Yale '29: Miscellaneous correspondence with alumni offices
Miscellaneous [mainly 40th Reunion, including Yale Medal citation]
Base and Chimes and Class Day
Memorabilia of Watson F. Kinney, Class of1929S
